title: ネバー・エンディング・ロード

text_block_list.text:
While Air Groove and I are on our way to
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, but you know Air Groove. She would
never...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yup... And the racewear...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's all this about me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you have something to say, just say it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We were just saying how pretty your new
racewear was.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's very elegant! And you wear it so well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So we were just chatting about wanting to see it
up close.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. If that's the case, then I'm honored to hear
it.
choice_data_list: Why don't you give them a little fashion show?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Why? We have training to get to. There's no time
for that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's what I figured...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: S-sorry to bother you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Very well. Just this once.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, here I am.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow... With racewear this good, it's like a work
of art even when you're just standing there...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That’s not true.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Simply wearing signature racewear is not the end
of it. Rather, it's merely the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The beauty of the racewear lies in how it
complements a well-trained body, fit to perform
on the track.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the design of the clothing means
little on its own. It can only truly shine if you put
in the effort to become worthy of it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm still... not all the way there myself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's not true!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're first-rate in our eyes, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You two...
choice_data_list: We need to keep on improving ourselves.
We need to keep on improving ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You two...
choice_data_list: We need to keep on improving ourselves.
We need to keep on improving ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, that is my intention. Becoming worthy
of one's racewear is a journey without end.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you wish to wear it, you must be constantly
improving yourself. Unlike a race, this path has no
finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No finish line? Sounds exhausting...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But therein lies its true worth. At least, I think so.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now, we really do have to get to our training.
Please excuse us.
With that, we head off to training.
Their glittering eyes watch us the whole way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not you too...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, fine. I accept your praise.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, I personally am not satisfied with where
I am. I'll continue to polish my skills and seek to
shine ever brighter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet, Dober, I expect you two to hone
yourselves as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hone yourselves until you shine brighter than
anyone else.

Air Groove and I head to training, leaving the
pair awestruck behind us.
